{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320144941F0882E2572F159AFAD9F"}"},"total":43382},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7176548103821361975","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看到82章了忍不住来打分评论（我是挺懒散的一个人，这可是第一次），必须满分！超级好看，整体框架不错，故事紧凑，语言简练，塑造的人物又很有趣，希望作者大大后面保持住啊，再接再厉！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1670920427,"group_id":"7138249318909086727","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2NGqeGijxaUhHXJUahrBQ8sCqmcPIPEU6QetAmOc8Pt","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6ac2e13d1bb54f3494715343bc82c4f6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528340&x-signature=YlZeTLrn1hGQOjNM1pFUaRIDdts%3D","user_id":"3953441605693000","user_name":"干净利落的玄神"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3953441605693000","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7138249318909086727","book_info":{"abstract":"（番茄搜天渊动画，看首支pv，与陈青源共赴九世红尘劫）
百年前，陈青源进入了一个名为天渊的禁区，魂灯熄灭，世人皆认为他死了。
今日，陈青源虽然活着走出了禁区，但是修为尽废，灵根断裂。
面对红颜的悔婚，各宗的欺压，陈青源该如何是好？
“陈青源，我给你两个选择：一，娶我;二......”
天渊内生活着一个红裙姑娘，眸若星辰，声音轻柔。
“我选择二。”
没等红裙姑娘说完话，陈青源毅然决然的做出了选择。
（主角腹黑+无系统+幽默+传统玄幻+简介无力，请看正文）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ab319dee710fb732b9b6d6806ba1fc90","author":"沐潇三生","author_id":"","book_id":"7138249318909086727","book_name":"天渊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8e0e8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"106.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7138249709948240417","read_count":"1061870","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"5424110"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"2613","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,腹黑,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3dbc7be59148237e1cea0ff8afa65cc0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779173381&x-signature=LexduXw6bLI1zpu%2FpkwtGH3G7fU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1363016883112413","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.3120356e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320144941F0882E2572F159AFAD9F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":291,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":23120,"reply_count":21,"show_pv":806538},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7168734725912740615","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好书，的确不错，无论是人物的构造还是剧情很好，人物构造细腻，而且整体不像其它小说那般杀来杀去，更多的是一种切磋，点到为止的感觉，豪情豪迈更多，性格方面也是点到为止，刚刚好。剧情也不错，能明显的看出剧情并没有那么简单，背后藏着一个更大巨大的剧情。这本小说也是一个修仙小说，我刚开始还以为是类似异世界，都市穿越之类的，但没想到还是一本算正的修仙小说。","text_exts":[{"e":148,"s":145,"text":"异世界","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%BC%82%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177398938159AFAD9F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227168734725912740615%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227138249318909086727%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BC%82%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1669101232,"group_id":"7138249318909086727","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"面对它吧，战胜它吧！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2LvNQ9eDL5ev9Vk0E+0bS4NiRYuVqJn5nr0pbxLPC4V","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7cbe2c330a1046dea922d533e0ab5fe0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776535620&x-signature=ys7GdcqI24BbeoHdQHhqrLFF2EY%3D","user_id":"3615629377015837","user_name":"狂小鸟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3615629377015837","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7138249318909086727","book_info":{"abstract":"（番茄搜天渊动画，看首支pv，与陈青源共赴九世红尘劫）
百年前，陈青源进入了一个名为天渊的禁区，魂灯熄灭，世人皆认为他死了。
今日，陈青源虽然活着走出了禁区，但是修为尽废，灵根断裂。
面对红颜的悔婚，各宗的欺压，陈青源该如何是好？
“陈青源，我给你两个选择：一，娶我;二......”
天渊内生活着一个红裙姑娘，眸若星辰，声音轻柔。

r":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7252601704814215976","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本小说非常不错，文笔很流畅，很潇洒，语言功底深厚，结构很合理，运用大量的人物对话中间参差的旁白语言，省去了很多人物对白中说道的，某某某说“道”。在这本小说里你不会感觉这个“道”字如此的生硬与嚼蜡无味，反而会感觉旁白里太多的内容需要慢慢回味。描写的细节也很有画面感，很多情节高潮之处，也能有深深的共鸣与内心的波澜。
真人讲书解读的时候，代入感很强，非常值得聆听，绝对值得一观一听的小说！！！[赞][赞][赞][爱心][爱心][爱心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1688628024,"group_id":"7138249318909086727","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"万雲腾空绕，一览众山小！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5Z4Z4uwaPaIy0ByYHozwgs=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/5938451fcf2c4719b0d52128b20bec40~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776535995&x-signature=%2F7AOST2XHwnLfhi%2FK%2BDL%2FopFLmQ%3D","user_id":"98513517670","user_name":"用户98513517"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"98513517670","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1698549820,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7138249318909086727","book_info":{"abstract":"（番茄搜天渊动画，看首支pv，与陈青源共赴九世红尘劫）
